fx-accounts-ping-release-rollout-2.userFacingDescription: Enable sending the Fx Accounts ping.

unified-api-for-spocs-and-top-sites-cont.userFacingName: Unified API for spocs and top sites - controlled rollout for release 133+
unified-api-for-spocs-and-top-sites-cont.userFacingDescription: We're switching to a new endpoint for the services supplying sponsored content and top sites to the new tab. This is a controlled rollout for 133 on the Release channel to that new endpoint.

desktop-credit-card-autofill-global-enab.userFacingName: Desktop Credit Card Autofill Global Enablement Rollout (Release)

value.regionWeatherConfig: ID, PH, MY, VN, TH, JP, TW, EG

hnt-weather-with-location-selector-non-e.userFacingName: HNT weather with location selector non-EU expansion Asian Language Family
hnt-weather-with-location-selector-non-e.userFacingDescription: Providing weather widget on the newtab to more countries

desktop-release-rollout-show-relay-to-al.userFacingName: Desktop Release Rollout: Show Relay to all Browsers - "Next" Sign-up modal CTA
desktop-release-rollout-show-relay-to-al.userFacingDescription: Firefox Relay lets you hide your real email address to keep your identity safe. This study looks at how people use Relay in the Firefox browser on their computer.

fast-udp-for-firefox-treatment-fast-udp-.userFacingName: Fast UDP for Firefox - Treatment Fast UDP Release Rollout
fast-udp-for-firefox-treatment-fast-udp-.userFacingDescription: Fast UDP for Firefox's QUIC HTTP3 I/O.

enforce-crlite-results-and-limit-use-of-.userFacingDescription: CRLite is a privacy-preserving tool for checking the revocation status of TLS certificates. This rollout disables OCSP in favor of CRLite for most certificates.

enable-nimbus-unenrollment-synchronizati.userFacingDescription: Switch to using the shared SQL datastore for Nimbus data store.

context-id-rotation-every-3-days.userFacingDescription: To help further reduce long-lived unique identifiers in Firefox Desktop, we want to begin regenerating the context ID every 3 days.

new-tab-content-ping-rest-of-world-rollo.userFacingName: New Tab content ping (rest of world rollout)
new-tab-content-ping-rest-of-world-rollo.userFacingDescription: We are testing sending of New Tab interaction events in the OHTTP (Oblivious HTTP) protocol, which better preserves user anonymity.

firefox-backup-feature-gradual-rollout.userFacingDescription: Enables the Firefox Backup feature for a small group of users on Windows 10.

long-term-holdback-2026-growth-desktop.userFacingDescription: Long-term holdback for 2025 H1 Growth experiments

set-to-default-hamburger-menu-rollout.userFacingName: Set to Default - Hamburger Menu Rollout
set-to-default-hamburger-menu-rollout.userFacingDescription: Rollout: Add "set to default" to the hamburger menu

smart-shortcuts-v3-lr2-no-lr-rollout.userFacingDescription: Adjusting presentation of shortcuts (topsites) displayed based on user's prior shortcut interactions and frecency.

enable-ohttp-for-mars-communications-on-.userFacingName: Enable OHTTP for MARS communications on Release
enable-ohttp-for-mars-communications-on-.userFacingDescription: Enables OHTTP for communicating with MARS from New Tab on Firefox Release.

pin-frequently-used-websites-promo-rollo.userFacingName: Pin Frequently Used Websites - Promo Rollout, Day 3+ users, All Locales
pin-frequently-used-websites-promo-rollo.userFacingDescription: This rollout recommends users with profiles older than 3 days to try out pinned tabs as a way to keep frequently used websites within reach.

upgraded-sidebar-rollout-without-messagi.userFacingDescription: This experiment introduces the sidebar toolbar button to the users' interface.

1-callout-contextual-chatbot-suggestion-.userFacingName: 1-Callout Contextual Chatbot Suggestion Treatment A Rollout V2
1-callout-contextual-chatbot-suggestion-.userFacingDescription: Provide contextual suggestions for users who visit an AI chatbot website.

ai-chatbot-page-summarization-mvp-treatm.userFacingName: AI Chatbot Page Summarization MVP - treatment-a-callout-badge Rollout V4

vertical-tabs-promo-rollout-day-3-profil.userFacingName: Vertical tabs Promo Rollout - Day 3 Profiles, All Locales
vertical-tabs-promo-rollout-day-3-profil.userFacingDescription: This rollout offers users to try vertical tabs.

downsample-uptakeremotecontent-events-gl.userFacingDescription: This rollout is intended to turn off collection of the events in the remote settings uptake category for the majority of clients. https://dictionary.telemetry.mozilla.org/apps/firefox_desktop?page=1&search=uptake.remotecontent

enable-enrollment-status-telemetry-for-f.userFacingName: Enable Enrollment Status Telemetry for Firefox Desktop (via nimbusTelemetry)

pdf-annotations-signatures-treatment-a-a.userFacingName: PDF Annotations Signatures - Treatment A - Already Default Rollout
pdf-annotations-signatures-treatment-a-a.userFacingDescription: This experiment displays a message in the PDF viewer that introduces the signature toolbar button.

disable-legacy-spoc-ping-by-default.userFacingName: Disable legacy spoc ping by default
disable-legacy-spoc-ping-by-default.userFacingDescription: Disables a legacy Glean ping that is no longer being used or actively monitored for changes.

fox-doodle-multi-action-cta-2025-dummy-r.userFacingName: Fox Doodle Multi-Action CTA 2025 - Dummy Rollout V2
fox-doodle-multi-action-cta-2025-dummy-r.userFacingDescription: Rollout: content cleanup, no message content

disable-legacy-top-sites-ping-by-default.userFacingDescription: Disables a legacy Glean ping that is no longer being used or actively monitored for changes.

multiple-profile-switching-rollout-featu.userFacingName: Multiple Profile Switching Rollout Feature only
multiple-profile-switching-rollout-featu.userFacingDescription: This feature makes it easier to create and manage different profiles.  This allows you to separate and protect your online life with a set of unique personal and task-based identities, created and defined by you, all in Firefox.

messages.targeting: messageImpressions.NEW_SELECTABLE_PROFILE_SPOTLIGHT[messageImpressions.NEW_SELECTABLE_PROFILE_SPOTLIGHT | length - 1] < currentDate|date - 604800000 && canCreateSelectableProfiles && !hasSelectableProfiles && !willShowDefaultPrompt && !activeNotifications && source == 'newtab' && previousSessionEnd && !hasActiveEnterprisePolicies && ((currentDate|date - profileAgeCreated) / 604800000) > 3

multiple-profile-switching-rollout-messa.userFacingName: Multiple Profile Switching Rollout Messages only
multiple-profile-switching-rollout-messa.userFacingDescription: This feature makes it easier to create and manage different profiles.  This allows you to separate and protect your online life with a set of unique personal and task-based identities, created and defined by you, all in Firefox.

new-tab-151220260328211913-to-release-14.userFacingDescription: This rollout ships New Tab version 151.2.20260328.211913 to the Release channel for version 149

felt-privacy-faster-the-10-tracker-miles.userFacingDescription: We aren't changing the messaging. We are only testing the how soon we show this message the first time to our users.

$l10n.text: Firefox helps pages load faster and tabs feel smoother to keep up with the way you browse.
Firefox blocks most trackers automatically, so you can browse with more privacy and control.
Get protections built into every new tab
Firefox helps you block distracting ads, organize your tabs, and keep videos in view without switching tabs.

kitified-value-prop-experiments-on-new-t.userFacingName: Kitified value prop experiments on New Tab - countries with no content re-run
kitified-value-prop-experiments-on-new-t.userFacingDescription: This experiment displays Kitified messages on the newtab page highlighting Firefox's core value propositions.

de.newtab-kitified-value-prop-focus-body: Mit Firefox können Sie störende Werbung blockieren, Tabs organisieren und Videos im Auge behalten, ohne Tabs zu wechseln.
de.newtab-kitified-value-prop-speed-body: Firefox hilft dabei, dass Seiten schneller geladen werden und Tabs flüssiger laufen, um mit Ihrer Art zu Surfen Schritt zuhalten.
de.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-bo: Firefox blockiert die meisten Tracker automatisch, damit Sie mit mehr Privatsphäre und Kontrolle surfen können.

fr.newtab-kitified-value-prop-focus-body: Firefox vous permet de bloquer les publicités intrusives, de mieux gérer vos onglets et de garder un œil sur des vidéos sans avoir besoin de changer d’onglet.
fr.newtab-kitified-value-prop-speed-body: Firefox accélère le chargement des pages et facilite l’affichage des onglets pour s’adapter à votre navigation.
fr.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-bo: Firefox bloque la majorité des traqueurs automatiquement, vous permettant ainsi de naviguer avec davantage de confidentialité et de contrôle.
fr.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-he: Obtenez des protections intégrées à chaque nouvel onglet

it.newtab-kitified-value-prop-focus-body: Con Firefox puoi bloccare le pubblicità invasive, gestire facilmente le tue schede e continuare a guardare i video senza cambiare scheda.
it.newtab-kitified-value-prop-speed-body: Con Firefox le pagine si caricano più velocemente e le schede sono più fluide per restare al passo con la tua navigazione.
it.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-bo: Firefox blocca automaticamente la maggior parte degli elementi traccianti, così puoi navigare con maggiore privacy e controllo.
it.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-he: Protezioni integrata in ogni nuova scheda

en-CA.newtab-kitified-value-prop-focus-body: Firefox helps you block distracting ads, organize your tabs, and keep videos in view without switching tabs.
en-CA.newtab-kitified-value-prop-speed-body: Firefox helps pages load faster and tabs feel smoother to keep up with the way you browse.
en-CA.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-bo: Firefox blocks most trackers automatically, so you can browse with more privacy and control.
en-CA.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-he: Get protections built into every new tab

en-GB.newtab-kitified-value-prop-focus-body: Firefox helps you block distracting ads, organise your tabs, and keep videos in view without switching tabs.
en-GB.newtab-kitified-value-prop-speed-body: Firefox helps pages load faster and tabs feel smoother to keep up with the way you browse.
en-GB.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-bo: Firefox blocks most trackers automatically, so you can browse with more privacy and control.
en-GB.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-he: Get protections built into every new tab

en-US.newtab-kitified-value-prop-focus-body: Firefox helps you block distracting ads, organize your tabs, and keep videos in view without switching tabs.
en-US.newtab-kitified-value-prop-speed-body: Firefox helps pages load faster and tabs feel smoother to keep up with the way you browse.
en-US.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-bo: Firefox blocks most trackers automatically, so you can browse with more privacy and control.
en-US.newtab-kitified-value-prop-protection-he: Get protections built into every new tab
